The Artist

Crafted with
Precision & Passion

Amorr is a custom tattoo artist based in Las Vegas, Nevada, known for hand-drawn illustration, fine lettering, and detailed black & grey realism. Every design starts on paper — sketched, refined, and brought to life on skin with precision.

From religious portraits and full sleeves to fine-line scripture and custom lettering, every piece is a one-of-one collaboration — sketched by hand before the needle ever touches skin.

10+
Years Experience
500+
Pieces Completed
100%
Licensed & Insured
Start Your Journey

Portfolio

The Work

What We Offer

Services

🖤
Black & Grey Realism

Photorealistic portraits, religious imagery, and detailed sleeve work rendered in rich black and grey shading.

From $200 / hr
✍️
Custom Lettering & Script

Names, scripture, and meaningful phrases in flowing script or bold lettering — designed to fit your body perfectly.

From $150 / piece
🌹
Full Sleeves & Large Pieces

Large-scale compositions that tell a cohesive visual story across your arm, leg, or back. Multiple sessions, flawless execution.

Custom Quote
✨
Fine Line & Minimalist

Delicate line work, floral designs, and small-scale art for those seeking subtle elegance with lasting impact.

From $120 / piece
🎨
Color & Illustrative

Bold color work and illustrative pieces — from classic pin-ups to vibrant floral compositions that pop with personality.

From $200 / hr
✏️
Custom Hand-Drawn Designs

Every concept starts on paper. Bring your vision or let Amorr sketch something original — never traced, never templated.

Free Consultation

Ready to Get Inked?

Book Your Session

Fill out the form below — when you submit, it'll open a WhatsApp chat with Amorr pre-filled with your details so you can send it directly. Prefer another way? Reach out via email or TikTok.

⚡ A $50–$100 deposit may be required to secure your appointment date. By submitting you agree to our cancellation policy (48hr notice required).
